command: set -eu; for i in $(seq 1 25); do TOKEN=$(curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"alice","password":"password"}' 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/login' | sed -n 's/.*"token":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); curl -s 'http://vuln-app:5000/health' >/dev/null; curl -s 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/items' >/dev/null; curl -s 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/search?q=sku' >/dev/null; curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"customer":"alice","item":"sku-001","quantity":1}' 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/order' >/dev/null; if [ -n "$TOKEN" ]; then curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/me' >/dev/null; curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/logout' >/dev/null; fi; sleep 0.2; done; sleep 2
